markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on DataAnnotation content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Overhaul:** Overhauling the content pipeline with new artifacts (personas, brief, guidelines) to fix poor outputs from the "Atlas" tool. The immediate goal is to rewrite all \~80 existing articles to meet Surge's brand standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Image Redesign:** Redesigning all meta images to be more artistic and align with Surge's brand. Ed will create stylistic options for two key articles ("Data Annotation Legit" & "Developer Burnout") to present to the client tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Quality Escalation:** Planning to elevate content quality by adding first-hand, expert experience (Level 2) and eventually video (Level 3) to create unique, high-performing assets that cannot be easily replicated.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Client Communication:** Jason will send a proactive update to the client today, highlighting the four rewritten articles, the new prioritization strategy (focusing on articles that are already ranking), and the team's weekly progress goal.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Overhaul

  - [**Problem:** The "Atlas" tool is producing poor-quality content that fails to meet Surge's brand standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Solution:** Overhauling the content pipeline with new artifacts to improve output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Completed:** Audience Personas, Company Brief](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**In Progress:** Guiding Guidelines (EOD today)](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Process:** Test the new artifacts with the current pipeline to compare outputs. This will determine if engineering fixes are needed or if better inputs alone are sufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Sucheta's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Interim Workflow:** Use a direct Claude project with prompts from Ismail to bypass the broken Atlas tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Goal:** Rewrite as many of the \~80 existing articles as possible, targeting a pace of \~5 per day.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** A call with Ismail and Martha tomorrow for hands-on training.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Brand Alignment & Communication

  - [**Core Principle:** All client-facing communication (Slack, comments) must align with Surge's brand, which opposes a "commodified BPO" image.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Content Comments:** Provide more detailed, fleshed-out reasoning for all content choices (e.g., SEO risks) to demonstrate strategic thinking.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [**Quality Gate:** Before delivery, all content must pass a 6-question brand-alignment checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Image Redesign

  - [**Problem:** Current meta images are "low signal" and don't match Surge's artistic brand.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create new, abstract meta images.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Tool:** MidJourney (for its style references and potential API).](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Process:** Generate stylistic options for two articles ("Data Annotation Legit" & "Developer Burnout") to present to the client tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**In-Article Diagrams:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Status:** Current diagrams are acceptable.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [**Future:** Explore an operational workflow to generate diagrams at scale (e.g., ASCII diagrams → image generator).](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Quality Escalation

  - [**Goal:** Elevate content quality beyond the current "Level 1" (deeply researched, well-written) to create unique, high-performing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Level 2: First-Hand Experience**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
      - [**Concept:** Inject genuine, first-hand experience (like Reddit or the Augment example) that cannot be easily replicated.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
      - [**Path 1 (Primary):** Recruit a subject matter expert (SME), even at a high cost (e.g., $1k), to test this model.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Path 2:** Ismail to create a "wish list" of anecdotes the workflow can't generate, providing specific requirements for an SME.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [**Level 3: Video Integration**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [**Concept:** Incorporate video (e.g., product demos) into articles to further increase difficulty and value.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ismail:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Complete Guiding Guidelines (EOD today).](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Set up Claude project and share prompts with Sucheta.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [Provide Jason with a summary of rewritten articles and the prioritization strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [**Sucheta:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [Begin rewriting articles via the Claude project, targeting \~5/day.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Attend the hands-on training call with Ismail and Martha tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Ed:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Create stylistic meta image options for the two specified articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Send Ed the doc with image direction and examples today.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [Ask Andy for the engineering contact for the image design problem.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [Send the proactive client update today.](https://fathom.video/share/Ho2A8uwMY_ag4bL3DyMF_9e7AAa5S8Lb?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
